content:
Stop comparing against example files.

I do NOT want a new OwnerAuthProvider.

I want you to modify the EXISTING authentication architecture.

Audit ONLY my existing files:

- lib/auth-context.tsx
- lib/supabase.ts
- app/_layout.tsx
- every router redirect
- every call to getSession()
- every call to onAuthStateChange()
- every use of INITIAL_SESSION
- every router.replace("/owner")
- every AsyncStorage auth restore

Find the exact root causing automatic owner sign-in.

Do not tell me it is fixed.

Show me:

1. the exact file
2. line number
3. function name
4. why automatic login still happens
5. the code change
6. commit SHA
7. APK proving the owner login screen appears after every cold launch.

No new architecture.
No new providers.
Fix the existing codebase.
